The '''Imperial troop transport''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Transport/Legends|transport]], somewhat similar to the [[TIE lander/Legends|TIE lander]], which also served the same purpose.

==Characteristics==
[[File:TIE_transportback.jpg|thumb|left|100px|Rear view of a troop [[Transport/Legends|transport]].]]

While the [[TIE series/Legends|TIE]] lander had broad, bent wings, this transport had smaller, straight wings. It also had an insect-like front part containing the cockpit, thus deviating from the standard TIE-cockpit design.

==History==
Imperial troops operating in [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin's]] [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] used these kinds of transports to and from the city. [[Mils Giel]] later used an Imperial troop transport to evacuate from [[Golrath/Legends|Golrath]] after his mission was a failure, although not before using a blaster to shoot down an X-wing that belonged to Luke Skywalker out of spite.
